repro_steps: Step 1: Instantiate SolanaExecutor with a mock RPC pool returning 5 SOL WSOL ATA balance but 0 native SOL balance.
Step 2: Call pollBalances for WSOL_MINT with expectedDeltaX. Observe timeout because it overwrites amountX with 0 native SOL balance.
Step 3: Call apply with an open decision for 1 WSOL deposit while wallet has 0.05 native SOL. Observe capping of tokenXAmount to 0.

failing_tests.name: ISSUE #31: pollBalances should not overwrite WSOL ATA balance with native SOL balance
ISSUE #31: apply (open) should not cap WSOL deposit amounts based on native SOL balance

edge_cases.description: Zero native SOL balance when depositing WSOL from ATA
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should use WSOL ATA balance directly and succeed without capping

caveats: Tested via mock RPC provider to simulate divergence between WSOL ATA balance and native SOL balance.
